    "Missing tracer wire on non-metallic pipe during backfill operations"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt backfilling operations immediately",
    "Install the required tracer wire along the non-metallic pipe run before continuing backfill"
  ],
  "rationale": "Non-metallic underground piping must have a tracer wire installed adjacent to the pipe to allow for future locating. Backfilling over the pipe without installing this wire is a sequence violation and creates a major defect that would require re-excavation if completed.",
